event: message_start
data: {"message":{"content":[],"id":"msg_6","model":"claude-opus-4.7","role":"assistant","stop_reason":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0}},"type":"message_start"}

event: content_block_start
data: {"content_block":{"text":"","type":"text"},"index":0,"type":"content_block_start"}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"delta":{"text":"Cached response.","type":"text_delta"},"index":0,"type":"content_block_delta"}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"index":0,"type":"content_block_stop"}

event: message_delta
data: {"delta":{"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null},"type":"message_delta","usage":{"cache_read_input_tokens":80,"input_tokens":100,"output_tokens":5}}

event: message_stop
data: {"type":"message_stop"}
